# Chapter 14: Hydraulics, pneumatics, mechatronic integration  (~130 pp)
- 14.1 Fluid power fundamentals (15) · 14.2 Hydraulic circuits, components, valves (20) · 14.3 Pneumatic systems and applications (15) · 14.4 Combined systems and selection (12) · 14.5 Mechatronic integration: mechanical + electrical + digital (20) · 14.6 System-level design for the full machine (20) · 14.7 Documentation, commissioning, handover (12) · 14.8 Failure section: leak failures, contamination, integration interface failures (16)

**Archetype**: balance, interface, scaling. **Project**: design a small mechatronic system with all three subsystems; integrate; document. **Exercises**: 25.
